name_en: 【Highest Version Original Factory Leather Top-tier Original with Full Counter Packaging】🆕 Exclusive Launch🆕 New Shopping Bag 2VG042🤙🤙 Another blockbuster sports-style bag, original stock 👏🏻👏🏻 Made of imported nylon fabric, top-tier hardware, nylon double handles and cross-grain leather trim. Two practical drawstring inner pockets on the sides, one zippered pocket on the back. Can also be attached to a suitcase handle, suitable for daily use and business trips, a perfect combination 🙊🙊 Lightweight and practical 🙋🏻🙋🏻 Size: 40x34x16cm
